description: Workflow: write a test, run it (expect fail), implement, re-run (expect pass)
text:
Step 1: Write a test assertion that describes the desired behavior
Step 2: Run the test with claireon.test_run() -- expect it to FAIL
Step 3: Implement the change that should make the test pass
Step 4: Run the test again with claireon.test_run() -- expect it to PASS
Step 5: Run related tests to ensure no regressions
